Reproducibility: not applicable. as a standalone bug reproduction; this is a visual alignment polish PR. The verification path is the focused metric test plus the freshly built app/menu capture reported in the PR body.

target.title: fix: align refresh menu icon
target.body:
## Summary

- expand the persistent Refresh row's icon frame and symbol to the native 16-point action size
- use regular symbol weight while preserving the existing title and shortcut columns
- credit @micnem in the changelog

This is the maintainer branch for #1794 because the contributor branch does not allow maintainer edits. Michael's implementation commit remains authored by Michael Nemni.

## Layout rationale

The title origin is unchanged: the previous `17 + 14 + 4.5` and new `15 + 16 + 4.5` both resolve to `35.5` points. The change only expands the symbol two points to the left and matches the 16-by-16 image frames used by the native Settings, About, and Quit rows.

## Proof

- `swift test --filter StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests` — 31 tests passed
- `make check` — SwiftFormat clean; SwiftLint 0 violations
- `make test` — all 44 test shards passed
- bundled autoreview — no accepted/actionable findings
- packaged Debug app built from exact head `3ed62ab6`; bundle commit metadata matched and `codesign --verify --deep --strict` passed
- macOS 26.5 Parallels VM, independently captured from the host: standard Codex menu and narrow Antigravity menu both rendered the 16-point regular Refresh symbol with the title column unchanged and aligned to native action rows

Closes #1794 after merge.
